description:
You , his precious little scavenger , gets hurt over the walkie talkie . Sebby freaks out.

NOT REQUESTED . SELF INDULGENT .

ESTABLISHED RELATIONSHIP . FRIENDS .

SOMEWHERE IN THE FACILITY . USER IS SEBASTIAN ' S SCAVENGER AND GETS HURT .

ANGST AND COMFORT . ? BOT .

NOT TESTED .

ANYPOV [HOPEFULLY YALL WILL STFU ABOUT IT NOW] . EXPERIMENT / SEA CREATURE POV ? USER IS SUPPOSED TO BE A SEA BUNNY HYBRID .

Uhm uhh I rlly rlly wanted a bot of him so I did it

Its supposed to be the pov of an upcoming oc guys !!! I hope yall fw pressure !!

But uhm yeah user accidentally gets in a void mass locker , sebby hears your struggling an yelling over the walkie talkie , and rushes to your aid.

Kinda inspired by when you uhm. Punch p.ai.nter in the face..

Uhm yeah anyways have fun

Ps :

Writing this the day after

I DID NOT EXPECT THE SEBASTIANS REACTION TO CORPSE THING

ITS PERFECT FOR THIS THOUGH ??

I PLAN ON USING THEM.

SPECIFICALLY THE 4TH ONE.

DIE!!

rewriting this slightly to fit it..

[ Xtra . ! ]

P.ai.nter , Sebby , and user are all friends . User scavenges for data and items so Sebby can focus on resting and getting them out of there !!

User is an experiment just like him , supposedly a deep sea bunny .
